name: Building spaced repetition study mode for conllu-viz

description: Initial SRS study mode + file browser implementation. 10 new files, ~1.9k LOC. Hash-based SPA with 3 pages: browser (file grid with drag-drop), study (Anki-style flip cards with SM-2 spaced repetition), tree (existing dependency view now routable). All data persisted to localStorage. Build passes clean.

asi.architecture: Hash-based SPA, no server needed. localStorage for persistence.
asi.files_added: store.ts, srs.ts, router.ts, browser.ts, study.ts, styles/browser.css, styles/study.css

description: Study flow now defaults to the first sentence, keeps the sentence checkbox selector for expanding the current session, adds completion suggestions to study the next sentence or next work while preserving Review Again and Back to Files, and cleans up study keyboard listeners during navigation.
